summary: Iteration 3 additions to Sahaaya fully verified. Backend: 20/20 new pytest tests passed for reminders CRUD+toggle, nostalgia list+filters (song/event/festival), events with nearby-ordering + RSVP toggle, aggregated /notifications (friend requests + nearby events + due reminders), and /chat language handling (English/Hindi returns Devanagari, Kannada returns Kannada script via Gemini). Frontend: login as Kamala → /feed renders feed-title 'Hello, Kamala Rao!' → VoiceNav card (data-testid='voice-nav' + voice-nav-btn) present → 5 quick tiles (quick-reminders/nostalgia/events/memories/companion) present → StoriesBar present → NotificationBell in header shows badge with count and clicking opens notification-panel with 4 items (friend_request from earlier iteration, 2 nearby Bengaluru events, 1 pending reminders). Reminders page: toggle-add-reminder opens add-reminder-form; submitting a reminder appends it; toggle-reminder-<id> flips taken_today; delete-reminder-<id> removes it. Nostalgia page: 10 seeded items render (songs+events+festivals), tab filtering works (song → 4 items with nostalgia-play-<id> YouTube links, festival → 3+), all/song/event/festival tabs functional. Events page: 9 events; Kamala (Bengaluru) sees 3 nearby events at top with 'Nearby' badge, RSVP toggles between 'I\'m interested' ↔ 'Going'. AI Companion: switching to lang-hi and sending 'Namaste...' returns a Gemini reply in Devanagari ('नमस्ते! आपको मेरा प्यार भरा प्रणाम...'); switching to lang-kn returns a Kannada-script reply ('ನಮಸ್ಕಾರ! ನಾನು ತುಂಬಾ ಚೆನ್ನಾಗಿದ್ದೇನೆ...'). Logout → /login. Unauth /reminders → /login. Unknown /blahblah → catch-all → /login (via Protected). No blocking issues.

issues: When user session had UI language set to Kannada then logged out, login page labels (email/password labels, login/register button) render Kannada text but with some glyph-fallback/font-hinting artifacts in the default system font. Purely cosmetic — functionality is unaffected and English/Hindi look normal. Consider bundling a Kannada web font (e.g. Noto Sans Kannada) for consistent rendering.

action_items: (Optional/cosmetic) Bundle a Kannada web font (Noto Sans Kannada) to avoid system-font fallback glyph artefacts on Kannada UI screens.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py has grown to ~840 lines with 5 new domains (reminders/nostalgia/events/notifications/chat) — consider splitting into routers/ subpackage as the file crosses the 700-line guideline.
GET /notifications aggregates 3 data sources sequentially — fine at current data size, but if events/reminders grow, consider indexing or capping.
/api/chat correctly resolves language from request → profile → English fallback; system prompt appends language-specific instruction. Good.
LLM error handler returns language-appropriate fallback message (Hindi/Kannada/English) — good defensive coding.
Mongo _id excluded via projection consistently across new endpoints — good.
VoiceNav uses Web Speech API with graceful fallback ('Voice not supported in this browser') — good.
NotificationBell polls /notifications every 60s with useEffect cleanup — reasonable; consider debouncing to reduce load if many tabs open.
EventsPage/NostalgiaPage/RemindersPage all have proper data-testids on interactive elements — great for testing.
Minor: The 5 Quick Access tiles use `grid-cols-5` which may look cramped on very small phones (<360px); consider `grid-cols-5 gap-1` or wrap to 2 rows below sm breakpoint. Non-blocking.
test_credentials: Seeded demo accounts (all password: demo1234): kamala@demo.com (Bengaluru), ramesh@demo.com (Pune), lakshmi@demo.com (Chennai), harbhajan@demo.com (Chandigarh).
seed_data_creation: During testing created a few TEST_/UI-TEST reminders (all deleted at end of each test), toggled RSVPs (toggled back to original state), and sent chat messages under Kamala's account (persisted in chat history — harmless).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 3 features verified. Backend endpoints: /api/reminders (GET/POST/toggle/DELETE), /api/nostalgia?category=, /api/events, /api/events/rsvp, /api/notifications, /api/chat (with language param). Frontend routes: /reminders, /nostalgia, /events, all Protected. Voice navigation and speechSynthesis features cannot be exercised in headless Playwright — DOM presence verified only. Emergent LLM key + Gemini 3 Flash is live and returning multilingual replies within ~5-10s.
rca of the issue: N/A — no failing flows. The initial nostalgia-articles=0 observation was a test-timing race (React useEffect hadn't finished setState before the DOM query) and resolved after a small wait_for_timeout.
